# Claim 5: ML-Specific Reward


---
<!-- trackio-cell
{"type": "markdown", "id": "cell_09959f5bb4db", "created_at": "2026-07-16T01:12:11+00:00", "title": "Verdict: v1 formula reproduced; v2 changed"}
-->
The executable branch tests reproduce the v1 equation exactly: invalid/error trajectories map to 0; valid non-editing actions and corner cases map to 0.5; a successful +0.01 metric change maps to 0.880797 under the paper’s scaling example, no change maps to 0.5, and a -0.01 regression maps to 0.119203. ArXiv v2 materially revises the equation: invalid/errors map to -1, non-edit/corner cases to 0, and successful edits receive linear normalized metric change. Thus the challenge statement is correct for v1 and incorrect if presented as the current v2 formula.


---
<!-- trackio-cell
{"type": "figure", "id": "cell_bc6d66ba5f5a", "created_at": "2026-07-16T01:23:08+00:00", "title": "Executable reward revision comparison"}
-->


````raw
{
  "job": {
    "id": "6a5830b6b1669a49bf0767d3",
    "url": "https://huggingface.co/jobs/binzhango/6a5830b6b1669a49bf0767d3",
    "hardware": "t4-small",
    "status": "COMPLETED",
    "total_seconds": 64,
    "running_seconds": 48
  },
  "scope": "Independent mechanism reproduction with synthetic candidate ideas, not a full ML-Agent checkpoint or benchmark reproduction.",
  "backend": "sentence-transformer",
  "model_id": "sentence-transformers/all-MiniLM-L6-v2",
  "seed": 17897,
  "candidate_count": 120,
  "selection_size": 10,
  "random_trials": 5000,
  "selection": {
    "v1_mean_distance": {
      "indices": [51, 79, 59, 6, 36, 42, 72, 58, 96, 52],
      "ideas": [
        "freeze backbone",
        "graph messagepassing",
        "LightGBM",
        "impute median",
        "bucket sequence length",
        "vision transformer",
        "knowledge distillation",
        "CatBoost",
        "exponential moving average",
        "unfreeze backbone"
      ],
      "metrics": {
        "mean_pairwise_cosine_distance": 0.964722752571106,
        "minimum_pairwise_cosine_distance": 0.20335984230041504,
        "axis_coverage": 3,
        "axis_counts": {"data": 2, "learning": 1, "model": 7}
      }
    },
    "v2_global_fps_diagnostic": {
      "indices": [51, 7, 59, 20, 80, 114, 106, 9, 72, 99],
      "metrics": {
        "mean_pairwise_cosine_distance": 0.9644887447357178,
        "minimum_pairwise_cosine_distance": 0.8771902322769165,
        "axis_coverage": 3,
        "axis_counts": {"data": 3, "learning": 4, "model": 3}
      },
      "note": "Global farthest-point sampling is a diagnostic proxy; arXiv v2 describes applying farthest-point sampling within three semantic axes."
    }
  },
  "random_baseline": {
    "mean": 0.8642730932831765,
    "std": 0.02692800972606479,
    "p95": 0.9059677660465241,
    "max": 0.9442906975746155
  },
  "reward_cases": {
    "invalid_runtime_error": {"v1": 0.0, "v2": -1.0},
    "corner_nonedit": {"v1": 0.5, "v2": 0.0},
    "genuine_improvement": {"v1": 0.8807970779778823, "v2": 0.02},
    "no_change": {"v1": 0.5, "v2": 0.0},
    "regression": {"v1": 0.11920292202211755, "v2": -0.02}
  }
}

````
